Music Libraries

A library is a directory full of artist folders that Stillwater scans, watches, and writes NFO/image files into. Add one library per top-level music root. Per-library settings control how Stillwater detects new files and whether NFO writes are locked for that library. Read more →

A library is a top-level directory containing one folder per artist; that is the layout Emby, Jellyfin, and Kodi all expect. Add a library entry for each such directory you want Stillwater to scan and write into. Filesystem watch mode is configured per entry below.

No libraries configured.

A short label to identify this library in the UI. It does not have to match the folder name on disk. Read more →
The absolute path to the root directory containing one folder per artist. Stillwater scans this directory and writes NFO and image files into it. The path must be accessible from the server where Stillwater is running. Read more →
